calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR EXPEDITED JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

EXPEDITED TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Dept. 611/Judge Anne-Christine Massullo
Clerk: Jose Rios Merida
01:30 PM

Appearances:
Attorney, Thomas J. Feeney of the law offices of Carbone Smoke Smith Brent & Leonard (510-267-7273), counsel for plaintiff is present

Nibras Hassan, plaintiff is present

Attorney, Philip A. Segal of the law offices of Kern Segal & Murray (415-474-1900), counsel for defendant is present

John Griffin, defendant is present

Cause comes on calendar from Department 206 for Mandatory Settlement Conference and/or Mandatory Expedited Jury Trial. The parties stipulate to Judge Massullo being both settlement and trial judge.

Motions In Limine are argued, submitted and ruled upon. Plaintiff's motion in limine is not in writing and therefore off calendar as untimely. Defendant's motions and limine are granted in part and denied in part. Motion In Limine Number three (3) is DENIED.

A jury panel is ordered and cancelled.

Court, counsel and parties conduct settlement negotiations in chambers. The case settles with the assistance of the Court. The matter is set for hearing on Order to Show Cause Re Dismissal per California Rule of Court 3.1385 in Department 610 on March 27, 2018 at 10:30 AM. Judge: Harold oKahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)tice sent by clerk.
